reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar. Baños limpios, agua gratis, estacionamiento gratuito con sombra, predio con asadores y profusamente arbolado. Excelente atención de todo el personal. No conocía esta zona de Buenos Aires. Felicitaciones.

(Translated by Google)
Great place. Clean restrooms, free water, free shaded parking, a grounds with grills and plenty of trees. Excellent service from all the staff. I wasn't familiar with this area of ​​Buenos Aires. Congratulations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2aHBldUJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es la estación del ACA,  se puede acceder a la parte interna del camping para mantener distancia social.
Todo es de excelencia.

(Translated by Google)
It's the ACA station; you can access the inner part of the campground to maintain social distancing.
Everything is excellent.

reviews.comment:
Ypf no resuelven los problemas.
Serviclub hace 7 semestre que no me solucionan el problema que se originó desde la aplicación.
Llamo seguido y lo único que hacen es registrar mi inquietud.

No cuidan a los clientes.

(Translated by Google)
YPF doesn't solve problems. Serviclub hasn't resolved the issue I have with the app for seven semesters. I call frequently, and all they do is register my complaint.

They don't care about their customers.
